title: bench-opencode-providers
description: Provider config for the akm-bench opencode harness. Materialised into each run's isolated OPENCODE_CONFIG directory.

defaultModel.description: Default model ID (e.g. 'don/mlx-community/qwen3.6-35b-a3b'). Used when BENCH_OPENCODE_MODEL is not set.

providers.description: Map of provider key to provider entry. Keys become the first segment of a model ID.

additionalProperties.description: A single provider entry forwarded verbatim into opencode.json.
